productDisplayName: Catwalk Women Brown & Olive Green Flats
description: A pair of open-toed brown and olive green flats, has Velcro closuresSynthetic upper, has a toe separator which extends to form a vertical strap, secured by a Velcro closure, connected to an elasticated midfoot strap and an ankle loop, secured by a Velcro closureSoft footbed with branding on the heelTextured outsole with patterned grooves, has a slightly upraised heelComes with a shoe bagWarranty: 15-day warranty for sole debonding only. No warranty on studs, sequins or other accessories (warranty not valid on products under discount or promotional offer)
